category_sources: source_facts.description says it manages Gateway API resources in Kubernetes clusters; official GitHub README describes managing and understanding Gateway API resources.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name and official GitHub repository README use the name gwctl.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README is the primary documentation surface with installation and usage examples.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/kubernetes-sigs/gwctl; per instruction, repo is returned as null and not second-guessed.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and executables identify a CLI for Kubernetes Gateway API resources; official README describes Gateway API management and usage.
